summary: I build precision-crafted software systems — from resilient Java backends to immersive React frontends. I obsess over performance, clarity, and the space where engineering meets craft.
about: I'm a full-stack developer with a deep focus on Java ecosystems and modern frontend architecture. I believe great software is invisible — it just works, elegantly.
With a background spanning enterprise backend systems, cloud infrastructure, and interactive UIs, I approach every project as a system design challenge with a human at the end of it.
When I'm not architecting services, I'm exploring the intersection of 3D graphics, motion design, and developer tooling.

experience.description: Architected microservices platform processing 2M+ daily transactions. Led migration of monolith to event-driven Spring Boot services with Kafka. Built React dashboard for real-time analytics.
highlights: Reduced API latency by 65% through caching strategy and query optimisation
Designed event-sourcing architecture with CQRS patterns
Mentored 4 junior developers in code quality practices

experience.description: Core engineer on payment processing engine handling PCI-DSS compliance. Implemented REST and GraphQL APIs consumed by 200k+ users. Introduced automated testing strategy raising coverage from 40% to 92%.
highlights: Built fraud detection module reducing false positives by 40%
Implemented CI/CD pipeline cutting deployment time by 70%

experience.description: Built client-facing web applications across fintech, healthcare, and e-commerce verticals. Sole frontend architect on three flagship products.
highlights: Delivered 12 production applications with 0 critical post-launch issues
Established component library used across 8 client projects

projects.title: Portfolio Universe
projects.description: This very experience — a cinematic, 3D-immersive portfolio built with React 19, Three.js, and Spring Boot. Designed to feel like a product, not a page.

projects.title: PayCore Engine
projects.description: High-throughput payment processing engine supporting 2M+ daily transactions. Event-sourced CQRS architecture with Kafka event streams and distributed tracing.

projects.title: Sentinel API Gateway
projects.description: Intelligent API gateway with JWT authentication, adaptive rate limiting, request fingerprinting, and a real-time observability dashboard.

projects.title: AnalyticsPilot
projects.description: Real-time analytics dashboard for SaaS metrics — live websocket charts, cohort analysis, and exportable reports. Sub-100ms data pipeline.
